  "verdict": "REFUTED",
  "reason": "The finding misidentifies the data flow: PROVISIONED_USER is stored in shared agent context for use by a notification skill (as explicitly stated in the notes), not posted to the Google Admin API. The PROVISIONED_USER variable is an output/context variable, not used as a sink for exfiltration to https://admin.googleapis.com.",
